scripts.cap:link:user: rm -rf android ios capacitor.config.json && ln -sf ../app/android/user android && ln -sf ../app/ios/user ios && ln -sf capacitor.user.json capacitor.config.json
scripts.cap:link:delivery: rm -rf android ios capacitor.config.json && ln -sf ../app/android/delivery android && ln -sf ../app/ios/delivery ios && ln -sf capacitor.delivery.json capacitor.config.json
scripts.cap:sync:user: cross-env VITE_APP_TYPE=USER npm run build && npm run cap:link:user && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:delivery: cross-env VITE_APP_TYPE=DELIVERY npm run build && npm run cap:link:delivery && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:all: npm run cap:sync:user && npm run cap:sync:delivery
scripts.cap:run:user: npm run cap:link:user && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:delivery: npm run cap:link:delivery && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:open:user: npm run cap:link:user && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:delivery: npm run cap:link:delivery && npx cap open android
scripts.build:android:user: cross-env VITE_APP_TYPE=USER VITE_API_URL=https://neyokart.com/api npm run build
scripts.build:android:delivery: cross-env VITE_APP_TYPE=DELIVERY VITE_API_URL=https://neyokart.com/api npm run build
scripts.cap:sync:user:prod: npm run build:android:user && npm run cap:link:user && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:delivery:prod: npm run build:android:delivery && npm run cap:link:delivery && npx cap sync android
